pi_items.source: GCompris official repository: https://github.com/KDE/gcompris/tree/master/src/activities/photo_hunter, ActivityInfo.qml confirms activity name is 'Photo Hunter'

GCompris official documentation at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gcompris/GCompris-qt/master/docs/manual-general lists 8 activity categories: Computer (Cat), Discovery (Penguin), Sciences (Pig), Fun (Dragon/Konqi), Math (Sheep), Puzzles (Panda), Reading (Cow), and Strategy (Frog). Photo Hunter ActivityInfo.qml confirms section: 'fun'
Task-specific path that cannot be verified against external sources. Path is specified by setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts.

privileged_info_summary: Photo Hunter is a real GCompris activity where players find differences between two side-by-side images. The activity is confirmed to be in GCompris with the official name 'Photo Hunter'. The activity is classified in the 'fun' category (Dragon/Konqi mascot) according to official GCompris documentation, not in 'Puzzles' (Panda) or 'Amusement' as the task metadata claims. Level 1 of Photo Hunter contains 3 differences to find, not 7 as suggested in the task description.
